metadata.title: Sneaking a Close-Quarters 2v1 Double Kill in VALORANT with Calm Aim
metadata.description:
Watch how a quick, careful approach turns a tough 2v1 fight into a clean double kill. Timing and focus make all the difference.
Where’s your favorite spot to pull off clutch plays?

Share your best moments below!

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!
